description: Workflow for fetching NBA scores, managing subscribers, and sending email notifications.
name: nba_scores_notification_workflow

transitions.description: Process a new subscription and send welcome email
transitions.end_state_description: User has subscribed and welcome email sent
transitions.name: subscribe_user

transitions.description: Fetch NBA scores, store them, and send notifications to subscribers
transitions.end_state_description: NBA scores fetched and notifications sent to subscribers
transitions.name: fetch_store_notify_scores
transitions.start_state_description: User subscribed and welcome email sent
